'''Mantologo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and a non-commissioned [[Imperial Marines/Legends|Imperial Marine]] officer who was assigned to the first [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], during its construction above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Despayre]], who quartered in the [[G-12 Barracks]] with [[Nova Stihl]].

{{Char-stub}}
